After extensive attempts to construct a SPARQL query for the Boston Red Sox attendance in the specified series, none of the queries returned results from Wikidata. This suggests the attendance data is not present in Wikidata under the expected properties or entities. Common properties like wdt:P774 (attendance) and wdt:P937 (attendance figure) were tested with various team linking properties (wdt:P541, wdt:P2832, wdt:P129), but no data was found for the 2018 World Series, 2013 ALCS, or 1975 ALCS. The issue likely stems from either missing data in Wikidata or incorrect entity/property mappings for these historical games.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?attendance WHERE {
  VALUES ?seriesLabel {
    "2018 World Series" "2013 ALCS" "1975 ALCS"
  }
  ?series rdfs:label ?seriesLabel .
  FILTER(langMatches(lang(?seriesLabel) , "en"))
  ?game wdt:P155 ?series ; wdt:P541 wd:Q14793 ; wdt:P937 ?attendance .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 1
```

Got no rows and 1 columns
